calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2026 Continued To Aug-19-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2026 Continued To Jun-17-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-01-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Joseph Schatz, Esq 415-677-9151 for Plaintiff.
Josh Friedman, 510-844-5100 Collins & Collins for Defendant.
Reporter: Andres Rodriguez, CSR #14226, 213-688-7887, calendar@hinesreporters.com

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.
The Court hears argument on both motions simultaneously.
Mr. Friedman contests and presents arguments; breach of contract claim, existence and scope of contract, cites paragraph 16, no breach of contract, diminution in value, cites paragraphs 12, 19, 21, attorney's fees, brief rebuttal.
Court comments, poses questions, looks at complaint.
Mr. Schatz responds to arguments by counsel; effective contract, work done, foreclosed from diminution of value, tenant occupied, paint contaminated with lead, attorney's fees as damges on contamination of property.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

2-DEFENDANT JOSEPH WOOD , AN INDIVIDUAL, MARY WOOD, J WOOD PAINTING & RESTORATION CO.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Taken Under Submission.***

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Reporter: Andres Rodriguez, CSR #14226, 213-688-7887, calendar@hinesreporters.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)

**After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***
